title: Add Highway Code Citations and Road Traffic Act 1988 References in collapsible Legal Reference panel

requirements.text: Add a static data structure (frontend-side) that maps each violation type to relevant Highway Code rules, including the rule number, description, and whether the rule is legally enforceable or advisory.

quotes: Highway Code Citations — specific rules flagged as enforceable vs advisory

acceptanceCriteria: Each violation type maps to at least one Highway Code rule entry
Each entry includes rule number, short description, and an enforceable/advisory flag
Advisory rules are visually distinguished from enforceable ones (e.g. label or badge)

requirements.text: Add a static data structure (frontend-side) that maps each violation type to relevant Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, including the section number and a short plain-English description of the offence.

quotes: Road Traffic Act References — violations tagged to RTA 1988 sections

acceptanceCriteria: Each violation type maps to at least one RTA 1988 section
Each entry includes section number (e.g. s.3, s.2) and a short description
Entries are accurate to common UK road traffic violation types already in the app

requirements.text: In the ReportDetail view, add a collapsible 'Legal Reference' panel that is collapsed by default. When expanded, it shows the Highway Code Citations and Road Traffic Act 1988 References relevant to the violations recorded in that report. Users who don't need legal detail are not shown it unless they actively expand the panel.

quotes: All legal references will be tucked away in a collapsible / toggleable 'Legal Reference' panel so users who don't need the legal detail won't be overwhelmed

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Legal Reference' section is present in the ReportDetail view
The panel is collapsed by default with a visible toggle button/chevron
Expanding the panel reveals Highway Code rules and RTA 1988 sections relevant to the report's violations
If no violations are recorded, the panel shows a message indicating no legal references apply
The panel can be collapsed again after being expanded

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Legal reference data must be static frontend-side mappings — no backend schema changes required for this step
Keep the existing incident/report flow (photo upload, vehicle info, surroundings, violation type, liability split, My Reports history) fully intact
nonGoals: Backend storage of legal reference data
